meaning: n.限制性条款,附文,附带条件
examples: I told Norman I would invest in his venture as long as he agreed to one proviso.
He agreed to their visit with the proviso that they should stay no longer than one week.
One proviso attaches to the legacy.
The sole proviso is the new money is spent on infrastructure from an approved list.
They include a proviso that a company selling shares in another company will escape capital-gains tax.
